name: mulaa-xmd
description: MULAA XMD: A professional multi-device WhatsApp bot for advanced automation and engagement.

SESSION_ID.description: The session ID for your Baileys WhatsApp connection. Essential for authentication.

ALIVE_IMG.description: URL to an image to be sent with the bot's 'alive' message.

ALIVE_MSG.description: The custom message for when the bot responds to an 'alive' command.

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Set to 'true' if you want the bot to automatically view WhatsApp statuses. Default is 'false'.

PREFIX.description: The command prefix for your bot (e.g., '.', '!', '/', '#').

OWNER_NAME.description: The name of the bot's owner, displayed in various messages.

BOT_NAME.description: The display name of the bot, if different from 'mulaa-xmd'.

TIME_ZONE.description: The IANA timezone for date/time calculations (e.g., 'Africa/Gaborone', 'America/New_York').
